description_long: This object is a highly stylized, fantasy-inspired blade with a dramatic, jagged profile and a sharply pointed tip. The blade features a series of pronounced, curved serrations along one edge, giving it an aggressive and ornamental appearance. The handle is slender and tapers slightly, with a subtle bulb at the end for grip, but lacks any visible wrapping or ergonomic contouring. The entire object appears to be made from a single, dark, metallic material with a glossy, reflective finish. There are no visible engravings, inlays, or decorative elements beyond the unique silhouette of the blade itself. The object is sleek and menacing, likely intended more for display or ceremonial use than for practical cutting.
description: A dark, glossy, fantasy-style blade with jagged, serrated edges and a slender, simple handle. The design is aggressive and ornamental, with a highly reflective surface.
description_view_0: The blade's jagged, serrated edge and pointed tip are clearly visible, along with the curved, tapering handle.
description_view_1: A thin, edge-on view showing the blade's minimal thickness and the handle's slight bulb at the end.
description_view_2: The opposite side of the blade, mirroring the jagged, serrated edge and pointed tip, with the handle visible.
description_view_3: Another edge-on view, similar to view 1, emphasizing the blade's thin profile and straight alignment.
attribute_handle_design: straight, slender, slightly bulbous end, smooth, metallic
